title: Nenjil Nenjil Idho song lyrics - Engeyum kadhal song lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Harish Ragavendra, Chinmayi
Song: Nenjil Nenjil
Movie: Engeyum Kadhal
Lyrics: Karky

[Nenjil Nenjil Idho idho
kadhal Kadhal priandhadho
Konjum kaatril mayangiye
Konjam meley parandhadho
Maalai vezhai velai kaatudho
En moolai vaanam juvaalai mootudho ] (2)

En nilavil en nilavil
oru minsaral thaan thoovudho
En kanavil En kanavil
unbinbath thugal inbangal pozhigayil

Nenjil Nenjil Idho idho
kadhal Kadhal priandhadho
Konjum kaatril mayangiye
Konjam meley parandhadho
Maalai vezhai velai kaatudho
En moolai vaanam juvaalai mootudho

Oru mounam parava
Siru kadhal poludhil
Vizhiyil vizhayum mozhiyil edhuvum kavidhayadi
Asayum imayil esaiyil edhuvum inimaiyadi

Ven Marbil padarum
Un paarvai vidavum
Idhyap pudharil sidharich sidhari valivadhu en
Oru udhirum thuzhiyil udhiram muludhum udhirvadhu en

urugadhey uyire
Vizhagadhey marale
Un kadhal verai kaanavendi
Vaanam thaandi unakul nuzhandhadho ..

Nenjil Nenjil Idho idho
kadhal Kadhal priandhadho ...

Pasiyodum idhalum
Pasierum viralum
Iradha pidhu irraya vizhayum neramidhu
Uyirin murayil myirin thooramadhu

oru vellai Thirayaiyaai
un ullam thirandhaai
Chiruga chiruga iravai thirudum tharigaye
Vidiyum varayil viralum idhalum thoorigayil

vidiyadhey irave
Mudiyadhey Kanave
Nee innum konjam nelam kori
kadhal kadhal thudika thudika

Nenjil Nenjil Idho idho
kadhal Kadhal priandhadho ...

oru minsaral thaan thoovudho

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Nenjil Nenjil Idho expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, capturing the essence of longing and affection.

How does this song fit into the plot of Engeyum Kadhal?

This song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship in the film.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Chinmayi and Harish Ragavendra, with music composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was the song released?

Nenjil Nenjil Idho was released on November 12, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nenjil Nenjil Idho, the romantic essence of love is beautifully portrayed through the soulful voices of Chinmayi and Harish Ragavendra. The song encapsulates the emotions of longing and affection, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. Set against the backdrop of Engeyum Kadhal, it enhances the narrative of love and connection between the characters. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create a captivating experience that resonates with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nenjil Nenjil Idho from the movie Engeyum Kadhal is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Chinmayi and Harish Ragavendra, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and melodious composition by Harrish Jeyaraj. Dive into the soothing vibes of this track that perfectly complements the film's love story.
stanzaMeanings: In the heart, there is love, love that has blossomed. In the gentle breeze, it has spread a little. The evening flower has shown its beauty. My heart is like the sky, filled with joy.
In my dreams, there is a gentle breeze. In my dreams, your presence brings happiness.
In the heart, there is love, love that has blossomed. In the gentle breeze, it has spread a little. The evening flower has shown its beauty. My heart is like the sky, filled with joy.
A silence spreads like a small love. In the eyes and in the words, everything is poetry. In the desires and in the music, there is no end to happiness.
In the depths of my heart, your gaze is captivating. In the new dawn, I find my strength. In a gentle touch, I feel everything.
Oh, my life, you are melting away. Don't let your love be hidden. Crossing the sky, you have come to me.
In the heart, there is love, love that has blossomed...
With hunger and thirst, with fingers and eyes, everything is intertwined. In the essence of life, there is no separation.
Like a white wave, you have opened your heart. A small, small thief steals the night. In the dawn, fingers and thirst are intertwined.
In the night that doesn't end, in the dream that can't be fulfilled, you still have a little time to love, love, and begin again.
In the heart, there is love, love that has blossomed...
In my dreams, there is a gentle breeze. In my dreams, your presence brings happiness.
